key.name: show-notifications
key.description: Notify when compatible Bluetooth audio devices connect, disconnect, or reach the low battery threshold.

key.name: battery-warning-threshold
key.description: The battery percentage that triggers a low battery notification for a connected headset.

key.name: show-rssi
key.description: Display RSSI values in the device menu when BlueZ provides them.

key.name: show-device-address
key.description: Display the Bluetooth MAC address for each connected device in the menu.
